body.title: Tool discovery needs semantic matching — keyword overlap fails for conversational queries
body.result: Synonym expansion in find_tool via _SYNONYM_MAP (20+ groups). 'reading progress' → list_reading_sessions at 0.50 (was 0.15). Root cause fix for Igor's silent tool-discovery failures. 11 tests.
body.description: find_tool() uses keyword overlap against tool names+descriptions. Scores are very low (0.07-0.29) for natural queries like 'how far with reading?' → needs list_reading_sessions. Root cause of Igor's inability to find his own tools, which causes silent stalls. Fix options: (1) embed tool descriptions and use cosine similarity, (2) add synonym/alias tags to tool registrations, (3) use cortex.search to find tools since they're registered as memories too. This directly feeds T-any-thoughts-habit-failure — most 'any thoughts?' gaps are tool-discovery failures.
